topic: Building RAG Systems That Don't Hallucinate
problem: 60% of production RAG implementations still hallucinate despite promises of accuracy
solution: 5 proven patterns for trustworthy RAG: content hashing, score boosting, hybrid search, source attribution, and feedback loops
audience: Backend developers building AI applications with Python
takeaways: Score boosting for retrieval quality (40% improvement)
Production monitoring with MRR and Precision@K
Cost optimization for embeddings and storage
proof: Built RAG systems for 5 Fortune 500 companies, 50M+ embeddings, 20+ deployments
